SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Show speed in status bar
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Display live ↓↑ speed as floating overlay (requires permission)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Show speed in notification
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Display ↓↑ speed + daily total in notification shade

Preference.android:title: About speed monitor
Preference.android:summary: Tap to learn about permissions and battery impact
